item.title: Presidential Message on the Anniversary of the Liberation of Guam
item.dc:creator: The White House
item.description: Today, our Nation marks the 82nd anniversary of the liberation of Guam.
item.content:encoded:
Today, our Nation marks the 82nd anniversary of the American liberation of Guam.

We honor the brave.

item.title: Trump Administration Announces More Than $5 Billion for the Genesis Mission
item.dc:creator: The White House
item.description: WASHINGTON, DC — Today, the White House announced funding.
item.content:encoded: WASHINGTON, DC — Today, the White House announced more than $5 billion.
